input: Draft a PRD for fixing cold-start retention. We have 38% of new signups never returning after day 1. Top reason from exit surveys: users couldn't find the value in 60 seconds. Team has 2 engineers for 4 weeks.
Draft a PRD for adding eval coverage to the agent pipeline. Current state: no automated evals; regressions caught manually. Engineering wants something we can run on every PR.
Draft a PRD for replacing our manual onboarding form with an AI-driven conversational flow. Goal: reduce time-to-first-value from 12 minutes to under 3.

Draft a PRD for adding a free-tier downgrade flow to the AI billing portal. Current state: users on paid plans cancel; we offer no downgrade option, only cancel. Hypothesis: a downgrade option would retain 30%+ of would-be cancels. Team: 1 PM, 2 engineers, 6 weeks.
Draft a PRD for an agentic incident-response feature. Goal: cut MTTR by 50%. Engineering wants known kill criteria before they greenlight.

Draft a PRD for replacing manual onboarding scheduling with an AI scheduler. Customer interview quotes: "It takes us three weeks to find a time" and "We give up and just do email tag." Goal: median time-to-first-meeting under 5 days.
Draft a PRD for adding agent evals to our shipping pipeline. We currently catch agent regressions in production. Want CI-fail-on-drift with a golden corpus.

Draft a PRD for moving our agent runtime from synchronous to async tool execution. Latency: -200ms target. Trade-off: worse error handling for long-running tools. Eng wants this called out explicitly.
Draft a PRD for an AI-powered customer success digest. Free tier first, then paid. Need staged rollout: 1% canary, 10% beta, 100% GA, with rollback at each stage.
Draft a PRD for a new agent-permissions tier. Needs sign-off from Legal (compliance), Security (audit trail), Sales (pricing), Eng (build).
